title: Sparkling Tridents
description: Gives channeling tridents an aesthetic spark.
body:
This simple data pack gives tridents enchanted with Channeling an aesthetic flair. During a thunderstorm, electric sparks will appear around the trident when thrown.
For being an aesthetic data pack, this could be useful for knowing the weather when underground.

![Trident being thrown in a dripstone cave, emitting sparks](https://i.imgur.com/O3MhRg7.png)
